summary: Completed testing of Site Map & Link Manager 4 new features: Bulk Link, Unlinked Pages Alert, Hover Preview tooltip, and Board View. All features working correctly. Backend sitemap endpoint returns 494 pages with linked_from references. Frontend displays all new features including checkboxes, bulk action bar, unlinked alert badge, view toggle, and drag-and-drop board view.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site Map & Link Manager with 4 new features fully tested. Features verified: 1) Bulk Link - checkboxes on each page row, 'Select all X pages' toggle, fixed bulk action bar at bottom with 4 destination buttons (Main Navigation, Top Bar, Footer Links, Homepage), 'X pages selected' count and Clear button. 2) Unlinked Pages Alert - red badge '484 unlinked' in header, clicking filters to show only unlinked pages. 3) Hover Preview tooltip - hovering over 'X links' badge shows tooltip with icons showing linked sources (Nav, Footer, Homepage). 4) Board View - toggle between List/Board views, source column with draggable page cards, 4 destination columns showing currently linked pages, drag-and-drop functionality using @hello-pangea/dnd.

backend: GET /api/website-admin/sitemap - returns 494 pages with proper structure
Sitemap returns linked_from references for each page
Pages have types: shop, collection, product, info, category
Summary counts match actual page counts
frontend: List View shows checkboxes on each page row
Select all toggle at top works ('Select all 494 pages')
Selecting pages shows fixed bulk action bar at bottom
Bulk action bar shows 'X pages selected' count and Clear button
Bulk action bar has 4 destination buttons: Main Navigation, Top Bar, Footer Links, Homepage
Unlinked alert badge shows in header with count (484 unlinked)
Clicking unlinked alert filters to show only unlinked pages
Hovering over 'X links' badge shows detailed preview tooltip with icons
View toggle switches between List and Board views
Board View shows Pages source column on the left
Board View shows 4 destination columns: Main Navigation, Top Bar, Footer Links, Homepage
Board View destination columns show currently linked pages inside them
'Not linked' badge shows in red for pages without any links
Filter pills and search work in both views
